errors.description: LTV evidence is missing timestamp attachment identity or timestamp token binding.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until timestamp attachment evidence is present

errors.description: LTV evidence is missing TSA certificate fingerprint or certificate-chain fingerprints.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until TSA certificate-chain metadata is complete

errors.description: LTV evidence is missing a trust-anchor fingerprint bound to the TSA chain.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until trust-anchor binding is proven

errors.description: LTV evidence is missing revocation evidence type, hash, or checked timestamp.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until revocation evidence metadata is complete

errors.description: LTV evidence hash or timestamp attachment binding does not match.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until hash continuity is canonical

errors.description: LTV validation policy identifier is missing or malformed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until validation policy is explicit

errors.description: LTV evidence identifier was already observed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until replay risk is resolved

errors.description: LTV evidence diagnostics contain sensitive or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny LTV verification until diagnostics are redacted
